# UtilityPole

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="UtilityPole icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="UtilityPole" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; ## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::UtilityPole;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        UtilityPole { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
electricity, energy, transmission line, telegraph pole, power lines, phone

## Categories
buildings, home, sustainability
